channel.title: ThreatDigest Hub - Curated Cyber Incidents
channel.description: A curated list of recent cyber incidents, attacks, and security threats.

item.title: What role has cyber warfare played in Iran?
item.description: When it comes to military firepower, the US and Israel are not shy about how they are attacking Iran. With professional photos and slick videos, US Central Command has been posting every few hours on social media about the kinds of weapons, jets and ships being used. But the US and Israel are far more coy on what is happening in cyber-space.
